notes: Large EPC is Stage 2; Stage 3 requires margin, progress revenue, and cash collection.
Low-margin orders are a cap unless cost control and working capital are proven.
PF delinquency spike and debt reschedule are hard 4C inputs.
Housing policy is Stage 1/2 until presales, margin, PF, and FCF confirm.
Bridge collapse and direct fatal safety events block Green.
Recurring fatal accidents create fine/license/site shutdown risk.
Data-center real asset needs tenant, NOI/AFFO, power/water, and capex per share.
Building-material demand weakness blocks Green until demand and margin stabilize.
